subject: Escavalier, an armored insectoid Pokemon with lance-like arms, charging forward
description: A heavily armored insectoid Pokemon charges forward against a burst of red and pink energy. The figure is encased in a full metallic shell — silver-white with red and dark trim — and extends two sharp lance-like appendages directly toward the viewer. The motion lines and radiating energy behind it convey speed and aggression. The composition is almost purely the creature filling the frame, with little environmental context visible behind the dynamic energy burst.
foreground: Armored insectoid creature with twin lance-arms thrust forward
background: Radiating energy burst in red and pink tones
